task_summary: Add explicit --live-desk support so mew-ghost can show real ./mew desk --json state while preserving fixture defaults.
notes: SP18 attempted to add live desk opt-in with mew as first implementer. Session #38 stopped before product edits after repeated Codex Web API disconnects. Session #39 generated a substantial source/tests/README/report patch, but ghost.py edit_file_hunks failed because one old text matched twice. After operator steering to use a full-file write or uniquely anchored single-file edit, the loop repeatedly returned wait guidance about collapsing same-file hunks instead of applying a corrected write batch. No product files were changed and no Codex product-code rescue edits were made. Existing issue #3 was reopened as the same write-batch ergonomics blocker.
